Constructors

CasinoController(ICasinoGamesService, IUserService, ITokenBlackListService, IHttpContextAccessor) 

public CasinoController(ICasinoGamesService casino, IUserService userService, ITokenBlackListService tokenBlackListService, IHttpContextAccessor httpContextAccessor)

Parameters

casino ICasinoGamesService
userService IUserService
tokenBlackListService ITokenBlackListService
httpContextAccessor IHttpContextAccessor

Methods

BlackJackHit(Guid)

El jugador pide una carta (Hit) en una partida de Blackjack existente.

[HttpPost("blackjack/{gameId}/hit")]
public ActionResult<BlackJackResponse> BlackJackHit(Guid gameId)

Parameters

gameId Guid

El ID de la partida de Blackjack.

Returns

ActionResult<BlackJackResponse>

El estado actualizado de la partida de Blackjack.

BlackJackStand(Guid)

El jugador se planta (Stand) en una partida de Blackjack existente.

[HttpPost("blackjack/{gameId}/stand")]
public ActionResult<BlackJackResponse> BlackJackStand(Guid gameId)

Parameters

gameId Guid

El ID de la partida de Blackjack.

Returns

ActionResult<BlackJackResponse>

El estado final de la partida de Blackjack después del turno del dealer.

CashOutHigherLower(Guid)

El jugador retira su recompensa acumulada en una partida de Higher or Lower.

[HttpPost("higherlower/{gameId}/cashout")]
public ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse> CashOutHigherLower(Guid gameId)

Parameters

gameId Guid

El ID de la partida de Higher or Lower.

Returns

ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse>

El estado final de la partida.

CoinGame(CoinGameRequest)

Plays a coin game using the specified request and returns the game result.

[HttpPost("CoinGame")]
public IActionResult CoinGame(CoinGameRequest request)

Parameters

request CoinGameRequest

The request containing the parameters for the coin game.

Returns

IActionResult

A response containing the result of the coin game.

EuropeanRoullete(SelectionUserEuropeanRoulette)

You can Play European Roulette Beting in color number, specific numbers, the first half, Dozen ,row... etc

[HttpPost("EuropeanRoullete")]
public ActionResult EuropeanRoullete(SelectionUserEuropeanRoulette Bet)

Parameters

Bet SelectionUserEuropeanRoulette

Returns

ActionResult

CashBack, the number of the roulette ball position and the bet

GetBlackJackGame(Guid)

Obtiene el estado actual de una partida de Blackjack.

[HttpGet("blackjack/{gameId}")]
public ActionResult<BlackJackResponse> GetBlackJackGame(Guid gameId)

Parameters

gameId Guid

El ID de la partida de Blackjack.

Returns

ActionResult<BlackJackResponse>

El estado actual de la partida de Blackjack.

GetHigherLowerGame(Guid)

Obtiene el estado actual de una partida de Higher or Lower.

[HttpGet("higherlower/{gameId}")]
public ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse> GetHigherLowerGame(Guid gameId)

Parameters

gameId Guid

El ID de la partida de Higher or Lower.

Returns

ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse>

El estado actual de la partida.

PlayHigherLower(HigherLowerPlayRequest)

El jugador hace su elección (HIGHER o LOWER) en una partida activa.

[HttpPost("higherlower/play")]
public ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse> PlayHigherLower(HigherLowerPlayRequest request)

Parameters

request HigherLowerPlayRequest

Contiene el GameId y la elección del jugador (HIGHER o LOWER).

Returns

ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse>

El estado actualizado de la partida de Higher or Lower.

RussianRoullete(List<Guid>)

The players plays a game where only can be stand up one of them

[HttpPost("RussianRoullete")]
public ActionResult RussianRoullete(List<Guid> IdPlayers)

Parameters

IdPlayers List<Guid>

Returns

ActionResult

Returns a list of the players and the round where each of them was eliminated and the winner of the game

StartBlackJack(BlackJackRequest)

Inicia una nueva partida de Blackjack con el animal especificado.

[HttpPost("blackjack/start")]
public ActionResult<BlackJackResponse> StartBlackJack(BlackJackRequest request)

Parameters

request BlackJackRequest

Contiene el ID del animal con el que se jugará.

Returns

ActionResult<BlackJackResponse>

El estado inicial de la partida de Blackjack.

StartHigherLower(HigherLowerRequest)

Inicia una nueva partida de Higher or Lower.

[HttpPost("higherlower/start")]
public ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse> StartHigherLower(HigherLowerRequest request)

Parameters

request HigherLowerRequest

Contiene el ID del animal con el que se jugará.

Returns

ActionResult<HigherLowerResponse>

El estado inicial de la partida de Higher or Lower.

Tragaperrillas(CoinGameRequest)

Plays a slot machine game for the specified animal and removes the animal from the system if found.

[HttpPost("TragaPerrillas")]
public ActionResult Tragaperrillas(CoinGameRequest Coin)

Parameters

Coin CoinGameRequest

The request containing the animal identifier and coin information.

Returns

ActionResult

An array of slot machine game results if the animal is found; otherwise, a NotFound result.

Made with docfx
